content.text:
Based on my visual inspection of the molecule, I have identified all covalently connected neighbour atoms to atom index 13 (Carbon). 

## Results:

**Atom 13 is Carbon (C)** with the following neighbour atoms:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 1 | N (Nitrogen) |
| 10 | C (Carbon) |
| 14 | H (Hydrogen) |
| 15 | C (Carbon) |

**geomconf_index:** 4766

These 4 atoms (N:1, C:10, H:14, and C:15) are all covalently bonded to C:13, as confirmed by the visible bonds in the molecular structure. Carbon 13 forms 4 bonds total - consistent with typical tetravalent carbon bonding.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 13, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
